title: QUILL Pronunciation Dictionary
description: A named, scoped collection of pronunciation entries applied to all QUILL speech (batch and live Read Aloud). See docs/planning/batch-document-to-speech-plan.md §4.7.

id.description: Stable unique id; also the JSON file stem.

scope.description: Location: 'global' (app data dir) or 'project' (the project folder's .quill/pronunciation/). Authoritative from where the file is stored.

engine.description: null = all engines; otherwise the synthesizer this dictionary targets.

enabled.description: Default on/off; the per-user selection in settings overrides this.

term.description: The word or phrase to match.

replacement.description: How to speak it (respelling, phoneme, or SSML per mode).

mode.description: respelling = plain phonetic text (all engines); phoneme/ssml = engine-native (advanced).

plain_fallback.description: Respelling used when the engine cannot honour mode; required for phoneme/ssml so global entries degrade gracefully.

regex.description: Treat term as a regular expression (advanced).
